reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is under construction but has a great atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: It is a government medical college, so we get through NEET UG first. Based on our rank, we are allotted this institute. MBBS is a prestigious degree and the college makes sure to provide all facilities to achieve that. Postgraduation is not functional here.
review_content.Infrastructure: College and hospital buildings are under construction right now but they will start functioning soon. Buildings present are oldish and fully functional with a 400-bed hospital. Mess food is homely. There is a basketball court, badminton court, and big lawns to spend a peaceful evening with friends.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: All about my college Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students got placements just because of the bond. It was basic pay Rs 56,000 per month. All students had to perform an internship in which they would get about Rs 25,000 per month for one year. During your internships you will get a lot of experience and patient exposure.
review_content.Infrastructure: It was an occupied college that's why infrastructure was not so good. But you will get a room with an attached balcony and bathroom. You had to pay around Rs 20,000 for a room in the hostel. Room will be shared with 3 people. You will get one bed, chair, study table, and almira per person.

description: Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 20319 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 20319 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 16429 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

On the basis of candidates' performance in the Haryana NEET UG exam, Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College Cutoff 2024 has been released for its third round. The Round 3 cutoff for admission to the Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) was 17091 for the General HS quota. For the OBC category candidates, the cutoff rank for the same course stood at 24682. college_info.college_name: Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How can I get into Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
M.Pharma Candidates completed B.Pharma. from PCI approved recognised institute/ university are eligible to apply. Candidate in final year are also eligible on provisional basis.
D.Pharma Candidate must have minimum age limit of 17 years and not more than 30 years as on 1 June 2022.
B.Pharma The lower age limit is 17 (seventeen) years as on 31.12.2022. A candidate should have been born on or before 31.12.2005. There is no upper age limit.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research?
faqs.answer: Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research has been rated 4.5 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

placements.overview:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research is an institute, established in 2008 in Durgapur, West Bengal. Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research is approved by AICTE and PCI and offers a total of 3 courses at UG and PG levels in 1 specialisation such as Pharmaceutical. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.Pharma, M.Pharma and D.Pharma in Full Time mode. Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 2,09,000 to 5,50,000. Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research has an annual seat intake of 175 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

At the UG and PG levels, Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers B.Pharma and D.Pharma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Pharma. The Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research course fee ranges between INR 2,09,000 to 5,50,000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers B.Pharma and D.Pharma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Pharma. The Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research course fee ranges between INR 2,09,000 to 5,50,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research offers Degree and Diploma courses including 2 UG and 1 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research has specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Pharmaceutical.

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research is up to 178. Good thing to know is that Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.review_title: A smooth and straight review of BCPSR.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70-80% of students from the total batch are placed. The highest package for 2024 was 8 LPA, the average was 5 LPA, and the lowest was 2.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Torrent, Nestle, and Sun Pharma. Almost all students get an internship in their 3rd year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good with all types of facilities, including sports, a gym, and walking/cycling areas. The total hostel fee is Rs. 72,000 for a year. The college provides a Wi-Fi connection, but not in 1st year. It will resume from the 3rd year. There is one hospital attached to the hostel, so no problem with health issues.

reviews_list.review_title: I am very impressed with the Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research, Durgapur.

review_content.Placements: Almost 95% of students get placed every year at this college. The lowest package is INR 2.8 L per annum and ranges to INR 8 L per annum. The top recruiting companies are Medplus, Apollo Hospital, and Sunpharma. Almost 90% of students get internships from the college. Our college offers the best education in pharmaceutics in the MPharm program.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in college but not unlimited. The college has good infrastructure with proper lighting and different labs for different subjects with all types of required instruments. The college also possesses an animal keeping house and a medicinal plant area.

reviews_list.review_title: Placements, Infrastructure and faculty are nice here.

review_content.Placements: In the last few years, our college placement percentage is increasing. Average percentage is 85%. In the last year, the highest package is 8.5 Lacs per year and the lowest one is 3.5 Lacs. GSK, Mankind, Cipla, Apollo pharmacy etc. are our recruiting companies. There is a placement cell present, this cell prepares the students for creating their CV great.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi available in the campus and hostel. Lots of games present there and the food is good. Cricket ground and football ground are present in the campus. Vegetarian food is available.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good and supportive college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got on-campus placements. The placement cell is very active, but no big companies are coming to the campus. Only a few, like Sun Pharma and Cipla, came as big companies. Other companies like Cognizant, Wipro, and Apollo Hospitals came for recruitment. Due to COVID, no companies are giving internships physically. Our training cell is not that active in terms of contacting and approaching industries for internships. They are very much aware of COVID as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The library has various books and relevant study materials. Laboratories are well-equipped, but the active ingredient date has expired, which is a bad thing. Computer labs can accommodate more than 30 people. Wi-Fi is available here. Classrooms are neat, clean, and well-maintained.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with supportive faculty.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good enough. This year, 60 students out of 100 have been placed. About 80% get placed every year. Different medical companies and hospitals like Apollo Hospital, Pulsus, Macloids, and Cipla are coming here for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. It is upgradable. All the instruments are working properly. When a chemical gets over, it is quickly rearranged. There is an inverter. In the canteen, non-veg food is not available. Every year, the college organises many sports events like cricket, badminton, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: It has average teachers, good extracurricular activities, environment and sports.

review_content.Placements: About 50 % of the seniors were placed last year in 2021. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA and the highest was 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are GSK, Cipla, and Apollo Hospitals and there is a two-tier exam, one is written one and the next is an interview.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available and the library is huge. The labs are clean and well-maintained and classrooms are also great.
review_content.Faculty: The teaching quality is very good. The course curriculum makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult but due to online exams the pass percentage is high.

content.Placements: In the last few years, our college placement percentage is increasing. Average percentage is 85%. In the last year, the highest package is 8.5 Lacs per year and the lowest one is 3.5 Lacs. GSK, Mankind, Cipla, Apollo pharmacy etc. are our recruiting companies. There is a placement cell present, this cell prepares the students for creating their CV great.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi available in the campus and hostel. Lots of games present there and the food is good. Cricket ground and football ground are present in the campus. Vegetarian food is available.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good and supportive college.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got on-campus placements. The placement cell is very active, but no big companies are coming to the campus. Only a few, like Sun Pharma and Cipla, came as big companies. Other companies like Cognizant, Wipro, and Apollo Hospitals came for recruitment. Due to COVID, no companies are giving internships physically. Our training cell is not that active in terms of contacting and approaching industries for internships. They are very much aware of COVID as well.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The library has various books and relevant study materials. Laboratories are well-equipped, but the active ingredient date has expired, which is a bad thing. Computer labs can accommodate more than 30 people. Wi-Fi is available here. Classrooms are neat, clean, and well-maintained.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Placements are good enough. This year, 60 students out of 100 have been placed. About 80% get placed every year. Different medical companies and hospitals like Apollo Hospital, Pulsus, Macloids, and Cipla are coming here for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. It is upgradable. All the instruments are working properly. When a chemical gets over, it is quickly rearranged. There is an inverter. In the canteen, non-veg food is not available. Every year, the college organises many sports events like cricket, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A smooth and straight review of BCPSR.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good with all types of facilities, including sports, a gym, and walking/cycling areas. The total hostel fee is Rs. 72,000 for a year. The college provides a Wi-Fi connection, but not in 1st year. It will resume from the 3rd year. There is one hospital attached to the hostel, so no problem with health issues.

reviews.review_heading: I am very impressed with the Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research, Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in college but not unlimited. The college has good infrastructure with proper lighting and different labs for different subjects with all types of required instruments. The college also possesses an animal keeping house and a medicinal plant area.

reviews.review_heading: Placements, Infrastructure and faculty are nice here.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available in the campus and hostel. Lots of games present there and the food is good. Cricket ground and football ground are present in the campus. Vegetarian food is available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good and supportive college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The library has various books and relevant study materials. Laboratories are well-equipped, but the active ingredient date has expired, which is a bad thing. Computer labs can accommodate more than 30 people. Wi-Fi is available here. Classrooms are neat, clean, and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It is upgradable. All the instruments are working properly. When a chemical gets over, it is quickly rearranged. There is an inverter. In the canteen, non-veg food is not available. Every year, the college organises many sports events like cricket, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It has average teachers, good extracurricular activities, environment and sports.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available and the library is huge. The labs are clean and well-maintained and classrooms are also great.

reviews.review_heading: I was somewhat satisfied with teachers and staff members behaviour and very good placements in 2018.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and I would rate it 3.5 stars out of 5. The library has various books and relevant study materials. Laboratories are well-equipped, but the active ingredients date is expired, which is a bad thing. Computer labs have more than 30 capacities. Wi-Fi is available here. Classrooms are neat, clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good like teaching staff members as well as sports.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is very beautiful because it is lush green, and we feel good and get closer to nature. Wi-Fi is available both in the college and in the hostel. We get the average quality of food in the hostel. Medical facilities are available, and an ambulance is 24 hours available in the hostel as well as in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Some facts about B. C. P. S. R.
reviews.review_text: The college has many facilities like medicine garden, laboratory, computer room, library etc. In hostel food quality is average but the accommodation is good. Both the college & the hostel has Wi-Fi facility. In college sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled including the hostel. Classrooms are quite good and hygienic. The library allows various types of books along with magazines, daily newspapers etc. Air-conditioned digitised classrooms are available. Medical facilities like first aid are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best when compared to all private colleges in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All the time it is upgrading itself. This year the college is also proposed to start PharmD course. Wi-Fi is available up to 34 MB. The books are available in the library all the time. Chemical and apparatus are also available. Sometimes, if it gets completed, it will be quickly arranged.

reviews.review_heading: Best in others average college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so good. It is upgradable. All the instruments are not working properly. Sometime chemical gets end but it is quickly rearrange. The college is not fully covered by air conditioner. But there is inverter. In canteen non veg food is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research is the best college of Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good, and the laboratory is very helpful. Library provides many international books and papers. Wi-Fi service is available here. The medical facilities are also available. Sports classes are also available in a weekend. Projector classes are very often.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of facilities, infrastructure, good placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good. Labs are well maintained. Library is good and the environment of library is so peaceful. Classroom is also well maintained. Medical facilities, canteen, sports and game all facilities are also good and sports and games are good and the playground is also well maintained.

review_summary.college_name: Maharaja Agrasen University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Things are under my knowledge.

content.Placements: It depends on their engagement in campus activities and other co-curricular activities. Mainly, 80% to 99% of students with good scores are eligible for placement. In my course, the highest package is around 45 LPA, and the lowest package is up to 12 LPA. Any firm needs corporate lawyers. Some companies, such as Aerowin, Yash Appliances, and Scorpions, offer internships with stipends. Many roles are offered in my course, like corporate lawyer, criminal lawyer, civil lawyer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is big and looks sophisticated, with many facilities like free Wi-Fi. Every classroom has air conditioning. Each department has its separate library. There is a gym for students, as well as a sports club, with rooms available for table tennis, badminton, cricket, etc. The quality of the mess food is quite impressive and tasty. The canteen contains all items, from milk prices, etc. Medical facilities are provided in the pharmacy block

individual_reviews.title: Maharaja Agrasen review by a student.

content.Placements: Placement cell organizes well-mannered company visits. They provide personality development classes as well for each stream student providing assistance. The highest package is 4.8 lakh per annum and the average is 3.2 lakh per annum. Alkem, Torrent Pharma, Cycus Pharma, Unichem Laboratories, etc. are the top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Provided with well-maintained library with Wi-Fi giving students the facility for detailed learning, labs are well furnished and equipped, though chemical are sometimes shortened by staff. Well-maintained classrooms with Wi-Fi are good as well for students and smart boards for good explanation .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best University in Solan.

content.Placements: The placement rate is 80%. The lowest package is 300,000, and the highest package is 1,800,000 LPA. Companies like Tech Mahindra, ICICI, HDFC, Hindustan Times, and many others recruit students. Almost 90% of students got internships and placements. You can pursue BBA in various fields like HR, marketing, and finance.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi, and labs in every department, and classrooms are well-maintained with hygiene. Every class has smart rooms, and every department has a separate library, along with a central library. Hostel and transportation facilities are also available. The mess and canteens are well-maintained, and medical facilities are available 24/7. Sports like indoor and outdoor are also available.

individual_reviews.title: I am studying B.Com LL.B in this university, & I am fully satisfied with the university environment.

content.Placements: Our university does not have placements for law students, but they allow us to do internships in July and this internship is mandatory for all students. They require an internship certificate and 100 percent of students are required to submit this certificate.
content.Infrastructure: We have all the necessary facilities in our university and the infrastructure is outstanding compared to other universities. Many facilities are provided in the classrooms and library and we also have wifi available. The food in the mess and canteen is amazing.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The university is very good and the facilities are very good. I love my university .

content.Placements: 25% of students got placements in companies. In our course, we have placements in web development, web design, graphic design, app making, animation and other jobs. The big companies, like Infosys and many others, came and gave placements to students.
content.Infrastructure: All classes have a ACs and each room has its own projector. The classrooms are very clean. The classes also have four or five fans. The lab also has all the necessary things, like computers and a projector, which are used by students to do their practical work.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharaja Agrasen University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Date

paragraphs: Maharaja Agrasen Universityadmission 2025is conducted online. Candidates seeking admission to any of the programmes offered by the University must satisfy the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective programmes. Eligible students need to register themselves online for admission through the official website of the University. 25% seats are filled by the bona fide candidates of Himachal Pradesh, while the remaining 75% seats are filled by the candidates of India. It offers more than 250coursesat UG, PG, diploma, PG diploma, certificate and doctoral level across multiple fields such as Applied Sciences, Law, Business & Management Studies, Commerce, Engineering and Pharmacy.

For Maharaja Agrasen University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Maharaja Agrasen University course admissions 2025:

Maharaja Agrasen University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around KUD admissions 2025:
Step 1: Maharaja Agrasen University Application Process 2025

Maharaja Agrasen University admission process 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at MAU. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Maharaja Agrasen University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as CAT, MAT or merit for the selection of respective courses. Furthermore, the university offers UG courses through its affiliated colleges. Admissions to UG courses are based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seat.
For more information check out the below video:

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Maharaja Agrasen University?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot join Maharaja Agrasen University directly. Admission to this University are entrance based.You should qualify any of the exams like CAT/CMAT/MAT/HPCET/XAT/GMAT/ATMA to make yourself eligible for selection for MBA programmes offered by the university. Then the shortlisted candidates are  required to appear for Group discussion and Personal interview round where they are further screened for final selection.You can apply for B.Tech at Maharaja Agrasen University through Jee Mains and HPCET.

faqs.question: Can I get into Maharaja Agrasen University with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: The admission process with 12th percentage differs from branch to branch. Whether it is BA in business, BA in english and other major branches the minium precent an aspring candidate would need is 45%.If you want to do Bachelor of Technology or B.Tech the eliblity criteria would be 50% marks in class 12th with physics and maths as mandatory subjects and the 3rd subject is optional.You can refer to the official website and validate or know details.

In UG 5-year course, 6 students were placed with the median salary of 4.80 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at Maharaja Agrasen University?
faqs.answer: Maharaja Agrasen University offers three streams in MBA programme that includes MBA in Hospitality and Tourism, Part Time MBA, and MBA. The total fee structure varies for each course. According to the college official website, the fee structure per semester has been published. The fee per semester for MBA programme is 55 K. The fees per semester for MBA in Hospitality and Tourism is 42.5 K. The fee per semester for MBA part time course is 55 K. The total tution fees for MBA is around 2 L. The total fee for MBA in Hospitality and Tourism is 1.7 L. Part time MBA course fees ranges around 2.4 L.

reviews.review_heading: Things are under my knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is big and looks sophisticated, with many facilities like free Wi-Fi. Every classroom has air conditioning. Each department has its separate library. There is a gym for students, as well as a sports club, with rooms available for table tennis, badminton, cricket, etc. The quality of the mess food is quite impressive and tasty. The canteen contains all items, from milk prices, etc. Medical facilities are provided in the pharmacy block

reviews.review_heading: Maharaja Agrasen review by a student.
reviews.review_text: Provided with well-maintained library with Wi-Fi giving students the facility for detailed learning, labs are well furnished and equipped, though chemical are sometimes shortened by staff. Well-maintained classrooms with Wi-Fi are good as well for students and smart boards for good explanation .

reviews.review_heading: Best University in Solan.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi, and labs in every department, and classrooms are well-maintained with hygiene. Every class has smart rooms, and every department has a separate library, along with a central library. Hostel and transportation facilities are also available. The mess and canteens are well-maintained, and medical facilities are available 24/7. Sports like indoor and outdoor are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am studying B.Com LL.B in this university, & I am fully satisfied with the university environment.
reviews.review_text: We have all the necessary facilities in our university and the infrastructure is outstanding compared to other universities. Many facilities are provided in the classrooms and library and we also have wifi available. The food in the mess and canteen is amazing.

reviews.review_heading: The university is very good and the facilities are very good. I love my university .
reviews.review_text:
All classes have a ACs and each room has its own projector. 
The classrooms are very clean. The classes also have four or five fans. The lab also has all the necessary things, like computers and a projector, which are used by students to do their practical work.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great university for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course students and their hostel facilities are good. They have their personal Wi-Fi password for daily work and usage, and they also have library book benefits. In the hostel, the food quality is good, and the hostel facilities are also good on the college campus. Medical facilities, in any type of injury and in bad condition, also treat the students in detail. Our college also has a basketball, football, volleyball and cricket ground for their tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Review for the college Maharaja Agrasen University.
reviews.review_text: In the department, there are classes with AC, and there's a library. There are proper labs separately for every subject with projectors. We do practicals daily as per time tables and make practical notebooks. Assignments are given from time to time. I am happy with college.

reviews.review_heading: Nice environment with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: u25cfThe classes are well furnished including smart rooms, AC facility. Labs also have proper infrastructure. Library has almost all kinds of books. There is even the facility of online library. The campus is full of greenery. You can enjoy the natural environment here. u25cfHere the hostels have three types of rooms - 1,  2 and 3 seater and the feels is also affordable as compare to other colleges. The mess food is okay-okay. Th medical facility is good here. For sports and games, there are cou...

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good infrastructure. The hostel is clean and huge. The food served in the mess is good in taste. It provides different meals with a healthy diet. All classrooms and labs are air-conditioned. All classrooms are huge.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, good facilities for libraries, and qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text:
Good Wi-Fi facilities are available in all departments.
All types of sports equipment are available in the sports room.
The quality of food is best available in the mess and canteen. Good medical facilities are available in the university, and they organise medical camps like blood donation camps.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our course is based on computers. Classrooms are well-maintained. Hostel rooms are decent at affordable prices. Our campus has good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Living my best life in this college .
reviews.review_text: In our college there are various facilities like library, multiple labs, play grounds and most important for me is gym. The product quality in college is very good . Everything is fine all computers in all the labs are working well. Food is also good but sometimes some dishes are not well prepared .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of highly qualified professors and good placement record from past 5 years.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. There is a Nescafe on our campus. Almost all the crowd of college can be seen during recess time. The hostel has a good infrastructure with well-furnished rooms. Labs are well maintained with more than 100 labs in our university. All the instruments are available in the labs, and we do a different type of experiments.

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied because the experience was good but bad too because of less exposure to in.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are actually one of the best but dinning could be a problem. The college infrastructure is also good with all equipments available in labs to perform or study a specific task. Also the labs are large enough to host a full group of students without any problems.

reviews.review_heading: Best University hereby local area and on the basis of study in this fees.
reviews.review_text: Best place and location of this college. In the lap of the mountain. Back side mountain and hills. It is situated in Kasauli hills. The nearby Railway station is Kalka. The bus stand is sector 43 ISBT Chandigarh. The college has the best labs with the latest instruments, computers and other facilities. Wi-Fi was available. The medical facility is available too. There are 2 hostels for senior and junior.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vaidyaratnam P.S. Varier Ayurveda College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.A.M.S. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MD and PG Diploma. The fee structure for the Vaidyaratnam P.S. Varier Ayurveda College programmes is around INR 49,620 to 1,35,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: We have a satisfactory atmosphere and faculty members with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: We have an assured one-year internship at the college hospital. There is no campus recruitment for this course. A Bachelor's degree in Ayurveda makes us have the role of an ayurvedic physician, and we become a lecturer if we take a PG. Most of the students either try for PG or start a clinic themselves.
review_content.Infrastructure: The government has provided free Wi-Fi at our college. We have enough classrooms with digital boards and also well-efficient labs. Our library has a good infrastructure, including a digital library platform. Medical facilities are very much available and the college gives importance to sports and the arts. The college provides a hostel facility for all the students, which is well-infrastructured. The food quality is good as the students run the mess. They prepare the menu, and order the essentials.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the good infrastructure and all the basic facilities provided.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the ayurvedic field. You can be a private practitioner, work in hospitals, pursue post-graduation, etc., after BAMS. After post-graduation, we can opt for the research field. The internship is a part of our course, and it is compulsory.
review_content.Infrastructure: For BAMS, there are almost all the basic facilities and infrastructure. Our institution has developed into a multi-unit and multi-crore organisation with manifold activities in the field of Ayurveda. Researches in Dravyaguna Vijnana, Panchakarma, Kayachikitsa, etc., are rapidly developing.

The college provides a hostel facility for all the students, which is well-infrastructured. The food quality is good as the students run the mess. They prepare the menu, and order the essentials.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the good infrastructure and all the basic facilities provided.

content.Placements: There are no placements in the ayurvedic field. You can be a private practitioner, work in hospitals, pursue post-graduation, etc., after BAMS. After post-graduation, we can opt for the research field. The internship is a part of our course, and it is compulsory.
content.Infrastructure: For BAMS, there are almost all the basic facilities and infrastructure. Our institution has developed into a multi-unit and multi-crore organisation with manifold activities in the field of Ayurveda. Researches in Dravyaguna Vijnana, Panchakarma, Kayachikitsa, etc., are rapidly developing.

faqs.answer: A:    Prof Brijmohan Mishra Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences provides programmes including M.Sc, M.Com, BPT, BMLT, B.Sc, B.Com, B.A, BBA, BCA, UG Diploma, D.El.Ed, B.Ed, D.Pharma, B.Pharma in streams such as Science, Accounting & Commerce, Medicine & Health Sciences, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Nursing, Teaching & Education, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Microbiology, Medical Laboratory Technology, Biotechnology, Computer Science.
faqs.question: Which courses does Prof Brijmohan Mishra Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences offer?

review_content.Placements: I got placed as a teacher as I enjoy learning and gaining knowledge. Students of our college have done internships in village schools. The highest salary offered is Rs.25,000 to Rs.40,000 per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college consisted of many labs like physics lab, biology lab, chemistry lab, and more than 140 classrooms. It provided the best quality facilities, like medical facilities, etc. Many sports events were organised in our college. Hostels provided the best rooms for girls and boys.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were helpful, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. They used practical concepts to teach students. I scored 84% in this course. First-semester was difficult because I studied in English medium, but in this course, I got Hindi medium.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is average, and students who want only a degree can join this college.

review_content.Placements: About 45% of students get placed. The highest package is 60,000, and the lowest salary is 5,000. You can get a job easily in the diagnosis centre and hospitals. Students who get the degree can pursue part-time or full-time jobs in hospital and diagnosis centres.
review_content.Infrastructure: BIMTS College is not well-reputed, but lab facilities are available. The classrooms are good. The library is huge, and there is no hostel in college. Medical facilities are limited. Functions are very good, and students of the college are very talented.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Elementary Education - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I'm absolutely satisfied with our college because of its infrastructure, facilities and low fee.

review_content.Placements: Approximately a minimum of 50% of students were placed from our college. In our college, the highest and the lowest salary package offered range between Rs. 50,000 per annum to 7 LPA. Every year approximately 85% of students get internships from our college in Jio, Tata, Amazon, Google and many more companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are very good. The hostel of our college is also very good and sufficient for students who stay in the hostel for their study. For students, there were many facilities in our college like Wi-Fi and a huge library to gain more knowledge, etc.

review_content.Placements: The placements and packages in this field are really good. All my colleagues and seniors with good practical knowledge have got excellent packages. If you understand the basic funds and things in your clinic, then you can do good practice and get good earnings. In our batch of 150 students, 95 students pass out in the first attempt. I am also from a major batch. Lots of my colleagues start private clinics immediately after their internships and make average earnings initially, but now after 3-4 years, they earn some really good money. Some of my colleagues do a deep study and start preparation for post-graduation, and after 2 years, they get admission in government dental hospitals and get a stipend of around 60,000. Initially, you may struggle, but after some years, you can make good money. Some of my colleagues who completed post-graduation make a monthly earning of 3-4 Lacs. All this depends on your skills.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good medical practices with the best faculty ever.

content.Placements: There are only 64 seats available for the BDS course. During the internship, they provide 18,000, and in the PG course, it increases, with the minimum payment for PG is Rs. 70,000. The government itself recruits students based on their percentage, and almost every student gets a chance for an internship in our college.
content.Infrastructure: There are two buildings in our college, which are truly spacious, and Wi-Fi facility is also available. Practical halls and lecture halls are spacious with all the electrical accessories. We have both an e-library and a real library that everyone is allowed to use. In our hostel, rooms are also spacious compared to others, and washrooms are clean, with electrical appliances. The mess is okay, but we have a huge ground in our college where we play volleyball, badminton, cricket, and many other games there.

individual_reviews.title: The GDCH CHH, Sambhajinagar.

Many of the professors here are students of the same college as well as the dean so opportunities to be a staff in the same college and hospital are seen.
content.Infrastructure: Library is available. Classrooms and labs are in good condition and are well-maintained. E-library is also present and GDCH also has a good library. In hostel, 3 to 4 people stay in one room. Electricity is available all the time. Medical facilities for students are very good and the staff is also helpful.

review_summary.college_name: Government Dental College And Hospital, Jamnagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, and the course curriculum is aligned with DCI.

content.Placements: About 80% of students get good jobs. Many students open their own clinics, and many of them are selected in MS. Many students work as professors in many private dental colleges. Overall placement chances are high if we pursue the course with dedication.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. All required items are provided by the college itself, which are used in dentistry. Hostels are also very good and newly built. Beds, almirahs, or tables are also provided by the government, so the overall experience is very good.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good government dental college.

content.Placements: The placements at our college are good. All students got good placements. The highest salary package is 14 LPA, and the average is 7 LPA. The course duration is 4 years plus 1 year of compulsory internship. In an internship, you have to manage many patients and lots of case studies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The mess food is good with proper hygiene. There is a library with lots of books. Our classrooms are digital with smart boards. Indoor and outdoor games are in our college. Boys and girls hostels are separate; girls hostels are locked after 10 pm.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best dental college with good facilities.

content.Placements: The placements at our college are very good. All students got good placements. The highest salary package is 14 LPA and the average is 7 LPA. The course duration is 4 years plus 1 year of compulsory internship. In an internship, there is a stipend of 7-8k per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good and well designed. Our classroom and hospital are in the same building. Boys and girls hostel buildings are separate; we are 3 people living in one room with an attached bathroom, study table and almirah. The mess food is also good for proper hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Dental College And Hospital, Jamnagar.

content.Placements: The placements of our college are good. Around 60-70% of students were placed from our college. The highest salary package is 14 LPA and the average is 7 LPA. The course duration is 4 years + 1 year compulsory internship. In the internship, you have to manage many patients to handle and case studies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent and well-developed. Boys and girls hostels are separate; we are three people living in one room with an attached bathroom. Mess food is also good with proper hygiene. There is also a library with lots of books. Medical care is also good with proper care.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Dental College And Hospital, Jamnagar.

content.Placements: The placements of our college are very good. All students got the best placements in good hospitals. The highest salary package is 14 LPA and the average is 7 LPA. The course duration is 4 years + 1 year compulsory internship. In the internship, there is a 6-7 k per month stipend for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well-developed. Our college classrooms and hospital are in the same building, so students do all work simultaneously. Canteen is not available on our campus. Boys and girls hostels are separate; girls' hostels are locked after 10pm.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jaipur College of Pharmacy offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. Whereas, at PG level, Jaipur College of Pharmacy offers courses such as M.Pharma. Jaipur College of Pharmacy fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,08,000 to 3,36,000.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college in Jaipur that provides you with good pharma jobs and pharma-related knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 40% of students get placement. The highest package in this course is 4 to 5,00,000 per annum. Companies that come to this college are Son Pharma, Kame Pharma, Glenmark, and other companies. Top roles offered in this course are sales and marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the college are really nice and friendly. They complete their graduation, and all are completed with a master's degree. Medical facilities and sports games are organized in the college.

overview_faqs.answer: The fees structure for programs offerred by the Jaipur College of Pharmacy is INR 108000 - INR 336000.

overview_faqs.question: Is Jaipur College of Pharmacy worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: Jaipur College of Pharmacy is a prestigious institution that offers Ph.D, M.Pharma, B.Pharma, D.Pharma programs. Students have the option to enroll in these courses to start their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. The institute is renowned for its dedicated and experienced faculty members who are committed to delivering these programs. Jaipur College of Pharmacy has earned a remarkable review rating of 4.25 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Furthermore, it has received ratings of 4.25 for Campus Life, 3.75 for Placements, 4.5 for Faculty, and 4.5 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Jaipur College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: “Good college with supportive faculty and helpful emvironment.”

content.Placements: Almost 75% of students from my batch got placed through campus placements. The highest package offered was around 6 LPA, the lowest was 2.5 LPA, and the average package was about 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters included Apollo Hospital, Fortis, government medical centres, and leading pharma companies. Around 60% of students got internships in reputed hospitals and labs. The top roles offered were staff nurse, clinical researcher, pharmacist, and medical lab assistant.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with modern labs, spacious classrooms, and a well-maintained library that has all the necessary pharmacy books and journals. Wi-Fi facility is available across the campus. Hostel rooms are clean and properly managed with 24/7 water and electricity supply. The mess food is average but hygienic and affordable. Medical facilities are also provided on campus, and regular health check-ups are available. Students also get opportunities to play sports and take part in cultural activities, which makes the overall environment balanced and student-friendly.

individual_reviews.title: Real review of students.

content.Placements: There were 60 students in the classroom, and the highest package offered by pharmaceutical companies was between 1.2 LPA and 1.8 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Apollo Pharmacy and SBL Private Limited. And 50% of students got internships from courses in many companies. The major roles offered in the course were marketing, salesman, and pharmacist in pharmacies and medical stores.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was quite old and not working well. Many classrooms did not have projectors or blackboards, and the library did not contain a sufficient quantity of books. The college did not provide any kind of hostel facility, and there were no facilities for medical services, sports, or games. There was a canteen on the college campus, but it did not offer a variety of food.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in Jaipur that provides you with good pharma jobs and pharma-related knowledge.

content.Placements: Approximately 40% of students get placement. The highest package in this course is 4 to 5,00,000 per annum. Companies that come to this college are Son Pharma, Kame Pharma, Glenmark, and other companies. Top roles offered in this course are sales and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the college are really nice and friendly. They complete their graduation, and all are completed with a master's degree. The infrastructure of the college is really good. Wi-Fi is available, and labs are available. Classrooms are really good. Libraries are nice, and hostels are not available in this college. Medical facilities and sports games are organized in the college.

individual_reviews.title: Jaipur College of Pharmacy, the best college for pharmacy courses.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placement; at least 90% of students are placed every year. The higher college provides good placement; at least 90% of students are placed every year. The highest salary package offered is 25 LPA and the lowest salary package is at least 5 LPA. Top companies like Cipla, Mankind, Sun Pharma, etc., visit our campus. The top roles offered include pharmacist and others.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. Labs are well-equipped. Our classrooms are well-furnished. Many books are available in the library. Indoor and outdoor games are available in college. The college has common rooms for boys and girls, so it's the best infrastructure at our college.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Jaipur College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: More than 39 students from our batch are placed at good pharmaceutical companies. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA to 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like AGS, Pharmaceuticals, etc., visit our campus. Every year, almost 40% of students are placed.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. The laboratories are good. Our lab assistants are available to guide and help with the practicals of various subjects, like medicinal chemistry, pharmaceutical analysis, pharmacognosy, pharmacology, and other subjects.

At the PG level, the university provides MBA, MSc, LLM, and other courses to students. The university also provides PhD, diploma, and certificate courses to students.
The university is famous for its popular programmes such as MBA and LLM. Management and Law students are placed in top companies. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by RDVV University and their respective eligibility and RDVV fee:

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 240 students were admitted at RDVV - Rani Durgavati Vishwavidyalaya and 220 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 220 students 12 were placed with median salary of INR 180000. A total of 255 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at RDVV - Rani Durgavati Vishwavidyalayaand 230 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 230 students 14 were placed with median salary of INR 220000. UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2018-19, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 59 students were admitted at RDVV - Rani Durgavati Vishwavidyalaya and 57 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 57 students 8 were placed with median salary of INR 144000 and 5 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year PG Degree, a total of 35 students were admitted at RDVV - Rani Durgavati Vishwavidyalaya and 9 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 9 students 2 were placed with median salary of INR 410000. A total of 35 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year PG degree at RDVV - Rani Durgavati Vishwavidyalayaand 19 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 19 students 6 were placed with median salary of INR 420000.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by St Aloysius' CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: BBA at St Aloysius' College.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is well maintained with a smartboard, with Wi-Fi available, and well equipped library. The hostel is not good, as I have heard the rooms are bad with bad hygiene and bad food for the students. The fees they take are high too, so much for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Gyan Ganga Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Facilities are good, the study in this college is the best. In the case of placement, it's average.
reviews.review_text: The library is present, and the labs are there. No hostel facility, 2 canteens are available. Sports kota is present, but Wi-Fi and solar facilities are not available in my college. Some classrooms have no AC. Very difficult to suffer in the summer season.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St Aloysius' CollegeReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I was kind of okay with the college not so good, not so bad. Still, I enjoyed my college life mostly
reviews.review_text: There were smart classes with good decorum, and the teachers were actually good. There was real discipline in the classes. As I stay in Jabalpur, I don't know about their hostels. There was Wi-Fi available. I heard the food in the hostel was average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St Aloysius' CollegeReviewed on 6 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classes and labs are renovated and good from my second year but in first year they are not that good only average. The new classes are very good. I do not stay in hostel so I can't say anything about it. There is a nurse's office, and some sports are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Gyan Ganga Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the college infrastructure. Placements are good then but now college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, classrooms are also okay. Library condition is well sports and games opportunity is also provided but hostel conditions are not that good. The canteen food is of good quality is also good medical staff present there for the full day. The department is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St Aloysius' CollegeReviewed on 29 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: About the nature of teachers and the seniors.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very good, and the meal quality of the mess is very good and delicious. There are many facilities that are provided in the room, such as 24/7 electricity and a bed. It has a good and friendly environment. The registration is done through our college, and the affordability is also very good, which comprises Rs. 20,000 per year. Hostel fee is Rs. 20,000 per year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Gyan Ganga Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good. Free Wi-Fi is available in labs, and the overall infrastructure is good. The library is quite good. The quality of food in the canteen is nice. Labs are big with no issues. My library experience is not very good because of a fine. Sports and games happen from time to time, and the AIML department is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St Aloysius' CollegeReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The library of our college and reading room are very good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is within the campus for UG where the fee for a year is 75000 and increases year by year. Here, we get a room, and all are two sharing rooms. There is a list of things we have to bring on our own. The food is okay, we can't complain about it they serve good food. Hostel fee is INR 75,000 per year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Shri Ram Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 21 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good but not a value for money college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent. There are facilities of a water cooler in the department and AC in all classrooms for cooling. Classrooms are quite good. Wi-Fi is available only in labs, and the systems are decent. College library is good, all the courses and other books are available in the library, and a huge space for sitting is provided by the library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by St Aloysius' CollegeReviewed on 18 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is top-notch.
reviews.review_text: In our college, hostel rooms were available for girls, not for boys. I lived in a room in Bholaram in Bhawarkua, Indore. The quality of food was good. We registered to call them and registered for a room. The rent was Rs 6,500 per month, except for electricity and other cleaning stuff.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Gyan Ganga Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good engineering college in Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good, and the infrastructure is also good. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice, and the labs are big, no problem. The library experience is very good in my case because I can sit there for study by bunking the class, and the sports and games also happen, and the AIML department is also nice. But the CSE department is too awesome.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Gyan Ganga Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 2 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a good environment and good internships.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are a little good in our department. The infrastructure is good. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice. Labs are big, and there is no problem. The library experience is also good. Sports and games also happen. The AI ML department is also nice. There are some free Wi-Fi connections also.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St Aloysius' CollegeReviewed on 30 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is decent, with no good placements. Skills are well taught. It has a good library and labs.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, Wi-Fi, labs, and the library are good. Hostels are good, but the distance is longer. We have to travel daily for about 2.5 KM for regular attendance at the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Mather Teresa Law CollegeReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the studies.
reviews.review_text: The mess/canteen facilities are also not available in the college. This college has no support for high amount of facilities as the campus is very small and the hostel facilities are also not available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Mather Teresa Law CollegeReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities of this college are moderate.
reviews.review_text: The courses offered in this college are very vast, and the LL.B. course is extremely good in this college. The facilities and infrastructure are extremely good, as they have a good number of classrooms. Hostel facilities are not available in the college.

college_info.intro:
Gandhinagar University's popular courses are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech specialisation in Civil Engineering, CSE, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and others. Gandhinagar University BTech students are placed in top companies in various sectors. BTech students can work as Web Developer, Data Science Engineer, Automotive Developer, Robotics Engineer, and others.
Gandhinagar University is one of the eminent universities. The university offers an MBA specialisation in Finance, HR, Marketing, Aviation, Hospital & Healthcare Management, and others. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Business Analysts, Finance Managers, Compliance Analysts, Market Research Analysts, Investment Bankers and others. Below are some of the programmes offered by Gandhinagar University:

placements.overview: Gandhinagar University admission 2025 is open. The university accepts admission based on merit and entrance-based. Moreover, the admission process is conducted through the Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC). The university accepts national entrance exams such as JEE Main, GUJCET, MAT, CAT, XAT, and others. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the university for the desired course. Gandhinagar University course admission begins with the online application. reviews_list.review_title: The college has very good facilities and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Last year in B.Tech Civil Engineering, about 24 students got placed out of 60, which is quite good. Almost all students who participated in college placements. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 3.4 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Wonder Cement, Larsen and Toubro [L&T], Siemens, etc. Also, some other private companies offered good job roles. Internships are plentiful in our college and also in our batch. Every student gets at least 2 internships. The top roles offered were maintenance engineer, civil engineer, transportation engineer, production engineer, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Gandhinagar University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College has good placements, supportive faculty members, and modern facilities.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent students from our batch got placed. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA and the average package is 5 LPA to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Byju's and Tech Mahindra. 60 percent students also got internships in reputed companies like Reliance, Adani and local IT startups. The major roles offered are software developer, data analyst, business development associate and network engineer. Placements are good with decent opportunities for both core and IT fields.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is well maintained with facilities like Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, smart classrooms and well stocked library. Hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, proper medical facilities, and 24X7 water and electricity supply. The food served in the mess is hygienic and has both vegetarian and non vegetarian options. Sports facilities like cricket ground, volleyball court and indoor games are available for students. Campus environment is friendly and supports both academics and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is amazing. Environment friendly, scalable for students, and much more.

content.Placements: About 80-85% of students are getting placed every year. The highest package is 14 LPA, while the lowest package is 5 LPA. The average package is 9.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Micron, TCS, Infosys, etc. Almost 90% of students got internships. They are placed in Infosys. Top roles are interns and managers.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are top-class. All the amenities are in use and are working appropriately. The quality of facilities in our hostel is at next level. They are providing delicious food. Medical facilities are also available. All types of games are been played on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has very good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Last year in B.Tech Civil Engineering, about 24 students got placed out of 60, which is quite good. Almost all students who participated in college placements. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 3.4 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Wonder Cement, Larsen and Toubro [L&T], Siemens, etc. Also, some other private companies offered good job roles. Internships are plentiful in our college and also in our batch. Every student gets at least 2 internships. The top roles offered were maintenance engineer, civil engineer, transportation engineer, production engineer, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college to study.

content.Placements: In our college, 15% of students get placed. The highest package is 15 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Companies like TCL, Infosys, Google, Microsoft, Samsung, Apple, Amazon, Flipkat, Blinkit, Torrent, etc., hire students from our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, and the library are very well-designed. The canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities are also good. There is a big ground in the backyard of the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Very good and nice college for engineering according to me.

content.Placements: 15% of students got placed on campus from our college. The highest package is 15 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Recruiting companies are TCL, Infosys, Samsung, Google, Facebook, Amazon, Flipkart, Tata, etc. The company placed our college students. 88% of students got internships from college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, and library are very well designed and give you very good vibe. Canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities are also good. There is a big ground in backyard of college.

paragraphs: Gandhinagar University admission 2025 admission 2025enquiry form is available. The university offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD courses. To get admission to Gandhi University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The university offers more than 20 courses in various streams such as Accounting & Commerce, Engineering, Science, etc. The application process atGandhi Universityis conducted online. Gandhi University's admission process includes registration and merit list preparation after the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in GU:
STEP 1: Gandhi University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online at the university's official website. The application process for PhD course is INR 1,000.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on the Admission Committee for Professional Courses, MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, Gandhinagar University, based on merit etc as per respective courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

faqs.answer: Gandhi University offers 1050 seats in the BTech programme. Applicants seeking admission to BTech can apply for the admission form online. To be eligible for admission to BTech, applicants must have lass 12 (PCM) or equivalent from a recognised board. The college accepts JEE Main/GUJCET entrance exam scores for admission to BTech courses.

faqs.question: Is Gandhinagar University hard to get admission?
faqs.answer: No, its not hard to get Gandhinagar University. The university accepts admission based on merit and entrance-based. Moreover, the admission process is conducted through the Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC). The university accepts national entrance exams such as JEE Main, GUJCET, MAT, CAT, XAT, and others.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Gandhinagar University accepts entrance exams for admission to all its courses. The college accepts scores of exams, such as ACPC/MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT and Gandhinagar University Exam. To get admisison, candidates are required to have a valid score in  entrance exam accepted and conducted by the university. After completeing the criteria, applicants need to visit the official website of college to fill out the application form.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: Gandhinagar University offers entrance-based admission to all its courses. The college accepts ACPC, MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT and Admission Committee of Gandhinagar University, based on Merit. Additionally, candidates are also required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria i.e. pass Class 12 for UG courses and Gradution degree for admission to PG courses.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Gandhinagar University offers?
faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, the college offers BTech, BCA, BSc and BCom and two courses i.e. M.Tech and MBA at postgradute level to students. Admission to all the courses is entrance based. To get admission, candidates are required to have valid score in accepted entrance exam. Candidate seeking admission to any courses can apply and appear for the exam for admission.

placement_data.title: Gandhinagar University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The University has a well-equipped Industry Interaction and Placement Cell , which facilitates all types of placemen related activities. The placement cell organises groo ming sessions, orientation programs and mock interview sessions for students. The University also organises summer internship programs to provide students hands-on corporate experience.

Gandhinagar University average package offered during placements 2023 was INR 4 LPA . The percentage of students placed was 95% and more than 125 companies visited the campus in 2023. The University has established 15 active MoUs with companies for better placements.

college_info.college_name: Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Pharmacy

highlights.summary:
Established in 1988, Mohamed Sathak AJ College of Pharmacy is a private institute located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It works under the aegis of the Mohamed Sathak Trust and is affiliated to The Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University, Chennai. Approved by the AICTE and the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), New Delhi, it offers full-time undergraduate and postgraduate courses in the field of Pharmacy. At UG-level, the college offers BPharm and BPharm (Lateral Entry), and MPharm is offered at the PG-level. It has a dedicated and experienced faculty who hail from both academic and industry backgrounds and ensure both educational and soft skill development of the students. The Campus features infrastructural facilities like libraries, hostels, canteen, digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, sports club, hospital & medical facilities, and labs.

Students can complete Mohamed Sathak AJ College of Pharmacy application process in online mode only for admission to its UG and PG courses. The admission cycle begins in March every year. Below are some important details of Mohamed Sathak AJ College of Pharmacy admission process that an applicant must know of:

Mohamed Sathak AJ College of Pharmacy offers full-time undergraduate and postgraduate courses in the field of Pharmacy. The courses offered by this Institute are listed below with details:

Tabulated below listed are the details of Mohamed Sathak AJ College of Pharmacy courses along with their eligibility and fee structure:

Note: Information on fee structure is not available on the official website.

Mohamed Sathak AJ College of Pharmacy placements are driven and managed by its on-campus training and placement cell which facilitates the employability of all the students enrolled in different academic programmes. This cell offers placement assistance and internships opportunities to the students for enhancing their skills and shape their careers.

Topmost companies visiting the campus includes Torrent Pharmaceuticals, Alembic Pharma, Glaxo Smith Kline Pharmaceuticals, Par Formulations, Troikaa Pharmaceuticals, Synerheal Pharma, Swiss Garnier Pharmaceuticals, Xeno Pharma, Zydus Health care, Himalaya Healthcare, Appollo Hospitals & Pharmacies, Newgen Life Pharma, to name a few.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Pharmacy offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG stage, courses available include B.Pharma. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.Pharma.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed Class 12 with individual passing marks in Physics, Chemistry, Biology or Botany & Zoology or Mathematics both in theory and practical with at least 35% marks and not less than 40% aggregate in above subjects (35% aggregate for SC/ ST) are eligible to apply for the BPharm programme at Mohamed Sathak AJ College of Pharmacy.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BPharm at Mohamed Sathak AJ College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants must pass Diploma in Pharmacy examination conducted by the Board of Examinations of the Government of Tamil Nadu or any other Board of any other state recognised as equivalent thereto by the authority of The Tamil Nadu Dr.M.G.R.Medical University, Chennai to apply for BPharm (LE) at Mohamed Sathak AJ College of Pharmacy.

reviews_list.review_title: A well-rounded learning experience - Mohamed Sathak A. J. College Of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: The Mohamed Sathak A. J. College of Pharmacy is well-organized and student-focused. The college offers regular training sessions, including soft skills, aptitude, and interview preparation, which help students become job-ready, and hospital visits are also available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hospital life is comfortable and student-friendly. The rooms are clean and well-ventilated with basic furniture. The mess serves hygienic food with veg and non-veg options. There is a medical facility for emergencies and good support during illness, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the good faculty members, good placements, infrastructure, etc.

review_content.Placements: More than 60% of students were placed in many big companies such as Madras pharma, Apex, and Cipla. About 30% of students got internships in Madras pharma. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Apex, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have labs for each subject. We have 10 labs and a good library. The quality of the food in our canteen is both fantastic and affordable. We have a clinic inside the college and a football field, a basketball court, etc.
review_content.Faculty: We have the best teachers and principal in our college. Teachers have doctorates in their field. Semester exams are slightly difficult, and the pass percentage is 89%. This course curriculum is relevant and makes the students industry-ready.

description: AIIMS, Rajkot cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS, Rajkot MBBS cutoff 2025 was 7712 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
