individual_reviews.title: ICP- a step towards excellence.

content.Placements: 10% of students were placed. Top recruiting companies include Himalaya, H&R, and LIC. Some students, around 4-5, got jobs or internships in health insurance firms, while others got placed in ADITYA BIRLA MEMORIAL HOSPITAL. Clinical pharmacist, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available for Pharma.D. are adequate and standard. Well-equipped labs, interactive and knowledgeable faculty members, and classrooms equipped with both blackboards and smartboards for digital and traditional learning are there. The library is extraordinary. The food is average.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are very good, placements can be improved, infrastructure is excellent.

content.Placements: Many companies do come for the placement, but the starting packages are much lower, so many of the students go for further studies or off-campus placement. The average package is about 2 LPA. The highest goes up to 3.5-4 LPA. Students are guided for the internships and the placements by the college staff.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The college has excellent labs and digital classes. The library also has a comfortable sitting arrangement and many books for guidance. Wi-Fi is not available in the college. The canteen also has a good taste. Hostel facility is also excellent. Mess food is average.

individual_reviews.title: Best college of pharmacy in Pune.

content.Placements: There should be much job opportunity in this course. This will be much placements opportunity through the campus interview in branded company like TCS, Sai pharm, Cognizant etc. 60% of the students got job through the campus. The top recruiting companies are Pharma ace analytics, Sonofi, Aboott pharma LTD, TCS, Cognizant. About 50% of students get placed from here. There is placement cell in our college, which mainly focuses on providing chance for students in well know companies. Indira college of pharmacy also tries to make most of students get internship.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty and staff members are so nice, which makes it worth and campus life is good.

content.Placements: As I'm in my first year now, I don't know much about it, but they give almost 100% placement for this course. They have ties with Aditya Birla Group of Hospitals and provide hospital-based internships every year, which is good for placement. I don't know much about packages.
content.Infrastructure: The lab facility is available, but there is a lack of apparatus in the labs. The library has so many books, and it even includes a reading room to study. Hostels are available on different campuses. The course is 6 years long, which includes 1 year of internship and has a wide scope in foreign countries.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Vidyasagar College as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Vidyasagar College is a well-known institution for B.A., B.Sc. courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Vidyasagar College has a rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 2.8 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is Vidyasagar College is good for BSc?
overview_faqs.answer: Vidyasagar college provides an exceptional opportunity to students seeking to pursue B.Sc. Geography Hons Course. The course is designed to provide students with comprehensive knowledge and skills in the field of geography. The highly qualified and experienced faculty members are committed to providing personalized attention to each student and ensuring their academic success. While the course does not guarantee placements, it equips students with the necessary skills and knowledge to perform well in competitive exams. With a well-rounded education and a strong foundation in geography, students are well-prepared to excel in their future careers.

review_summary.college_name: Vidyasagar College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is satisfying and decent.

content.Placements: Our college's placement is decent. Every year, a job fair is conducted. About 65% of students from my course get placed. The recruiting companies are well-known, like TCS, Wipro, etc. About 100% of students in my course get internships at these companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our lab is superb, and all instruments are available. We also have a research lab. We can access the lab at any time. Free Wi-Fi is provided. Classrooms are clean, and we have a library with a huge collection of 30,000 books. Our college has no hostel, which is a drawback. Our canteen is good. The quality food is available. Calcutta Medical College and Hospital is nearby for medical facilities. Annual sports are also conducted in our college.

individual_reviews.title: Vidyasagar College played a great role in Bengal in the past and still plays in the present.

content.Placements: Vidyasagar College has a highly active placement cell and being a student from the English department of this college. The placement cell worked very good as our head of the department sir is a part of the placement cell himself. A few companies like Infosys come here every year to provide jobs to students. A few years ago a students from Vidyasagar College got the package of 12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi service is available within the college premises, which is quite satisfying, and enjoy high-speed data. Canteen of this college has a large number of food on its menu at a quite low price. Though we don't provide any hostel facility. Once, we had hostel but later it was developed as the college's new building on Bidhan Sarani.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biological Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the college infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our course contains a good amount of students around 30-40 number of students. There are no such different packages for my course. The course feels very affordable like Rs. 5000 - 6000. The internship is not confirmed in this course. As the internship is not yet provided to me that's why I can't give you ideas about it but as I heard they provide a placement guarantee but I don't know the company name.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available for all the students in the campus. Labs are also available but the labs are not cleaned and maintained. Classrooms are large but not well maintained. Sometimes fans and light doesn't even work.The library is good. The canteen food is good. Annual sports and games also happen here.

individual_reviews.title: Really good faculty and teaching methods.

content.Placements: The placement rate in this college is over 50%. The top hiring companies are Birla group, ICICI Bank, Reliance, Policy Bazaar, etc. The average starting salary ranges from 15000 to 20000. There are no opportunities for internships from my college. Since this is a government college, you don't get a job. On average, the fee for the whole course is 60,000.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is a heritage building with many historical touches. The classrooms are also quite old, but it's a memorable part of Vidyasagar. Labs, a library and a gym are available. However, there are no hostel facilities in my college but my university does offer hostel accommodation.

individual_reviews.title: Top 10 College in Kolkata

content.Placements: The course is very easy, thanks to our teachers' guidance. They offer an average package, and 20% of students get a chance. They provide multiple job roles. I am very satisfied, but this is a normal graduation college, so you can't expect very much from them. Overall, it's a good experience.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom is very clean, and the environment is so good. The staff is very helpful. There is no hostel attached to the college. Wifi, a canteen, and a playground are available. The food quality is very good and reasonable, and the staff's behavior is also good. Seniors are very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: This college is well reputed and has a good education culture.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge collection of books, journals, and sufficient relevant books in the library to fulfill the students' requirements. The classrooms are huge, maintained, and well-equipped, and there are lab rooms represented for various subjects. Staff rooms and students' common rooms are well-maintained. Boys and girls have separate hostels that provide clean bathrooms, water and electricity supply, and proper security to the students. The canteen provides good quality hygienic food at an afforda...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Kolkata to take admission for the B.Sc. geography Hons Course.
reviews.review_text: The college is non-AC. But the 24/7 Wi-Fi is there. The infrastructure is good, but the building could be better because it is old and you can find its heritage. Unfortunately, there is no hostel facility. If you are willing to live beside the college, you have to choose to pay guests, and there is plenty of paying guest rooms for boys and girls at a low price.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Hardware and software labs are average. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. Software lab is air-conditioned. Every department has its library. Good food is served in the canteen. Medical support, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Kolkata. You can take admission here.
reviews.review_text: In this college, there has Wi-Fi below the department of Physics. The classrooms are moderate but the lab is not so good. The machines and apparatus are not working properly. There has a canteen on the ground floor the food quality is not bad. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vidyasagar College.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and library are good. Our computer laboratory is not good. There are 20 computers but most of them have some kind of defects, and none of them except 1 has a network interface to connect to the internet till now. The Wi-Fi does not work well, even the departments cannot rely on this Wi-Fi in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good and affordable college under Calcutta University.
reviews.review_text: I don't stay in any hostel or mess. The classrooms are big and airy, and our college has Wi-Fi. As I study English, I don't need labs, but for other subjects, I know labs are available. Our college does have a big library plus a gym. There is also a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has good Wi-Fi connection. Labs and library are pretty much accommodated with good quality facilities. The hostel doesn't have its own hostel. One has to find a PG nearby college. I would not prefer to eat in the college canteen. The college has a sports quota. So, students who can ace in sports can apply for this college too. The college has sports faculty too.

reviews.review_heading: This college is overall good, but the outside infrastructure should be maintained.
reviews.review_text: The campus surroundings are very good. There are many hostels nearby the college. Our college has Wi-Fi with good speed. There are many labs, classrooms and a library. The infrastructure is good, and the quality is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities and infrastructure are very good.
reviews.review_text: The library is well-equipped with books, and all books are available at our library. Free Wi-Fi is also offered by our college library. The hostel facility is not available in our college because it is a graduation college. The canteen and playground are also available.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an average private college. Those who want to study B.Tech or B. Pharm can go to this college.

review_content.Placements: The D Pharm batch, passing in 2024, had 50-60 percent of students placed. The highest package was 1.8 LPA. Top companies such as Apollo and Johnson. MR and retail pharmacy jobs were the top roles offered. Every year companies visited the campus, some gave offer letters on the spot, while others conducted a second interview at their place.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food and hostel quality were below average. There was no medical facility. There were only a few sports to play. The infrastructure was poor, with no Wi-Fi, no AC and labs with only a few equipment. There were no smart boards or computers. Classrooms and washrooms were damaged, with no water. There was a playground and open badminton court.

reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members of our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable.

review_content.Placements: About 55% of students get placed in our course. The average salary package offered in our college and course is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., visit the college. Top roles offered by our college are data analyst, software engineer, web developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is also very good. There are 5 Wi-Fi connections in our hostel. The mess food is also tasty. There is no ragging in our college. The environment of our college is very good. The ground of our college is also big with greenery.

individual_reviews.title: The HRIT college of Duhai.

content.Placements: 85% of students were placed in my course. 3 LPA to 7 LPA was average package in my course. Cipla was recruiting company for our course. 100% of students got internships from my course at the college. Marketing and manufacturing and teaching lines were the top roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: All labs were neat and clean but non-AC. Wi-Fi was not working on the campus of HRIT. Classroom was average and projector class was good. Seminar halls were very good. Library was also average but all books were available for study. College canteen was also very big and had good service.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college for a bright future.

content.Placements: The college offered good placement opportunities, especially for Computer Science and IT branches. 85 percent students got placed last year with top companies like TCS, Infosys and Wipro visiting the campus. The highest package was 12 LPA and the average was 4.5 LPA. The placement cell was supportive and arranged mock interviews and resume-building sessions.
content.Infrastructure: The campus was well-maintained with modern classrooms, labs, and a high-speed Wi-Fi facility. The library had a wide range of academic resources. The hostel facilities were decent, with good food in the mess and basic medical services available. Sports facilities and common rooms were also available for relaxation.

individual_reviews.title: It is an average private college. Those who want to study B.Tech or B. Pharm can go to this college.

content.Placements: The D Pharm batch, passing in 2024, had 50-60 percent of students placed. The highest package was 1.8 LPA. Top companies such as Apollo and Johnson. MR and retail pharmacy jobs were the top roles offered. Every year companies visited the campus, some gave offer letters on the spot, while others conducted a second interview at their place.
content.Infrastructure: The food and hostel quality were below average. There was no medical facility. There were only a few sports to play. The infrastructure was poor, with no Wi-Fi, no AC and labs with only a few equipment. There were no smart boards or computers. Classrooms and washrooms were damaged, with no water. There was a playground and open badminton court.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty members of our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable.

content.Placements: About 55% of students get placed in our course. The average salary package offered in our college and course is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., visit the college. Top roles offered by our college are data analyst, software engineer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is also very good. There are 5 Wi-Fi connections in our hostel. The mess food is also tasty. There is no ragging in our college. The environment of our college is very good. The ground of our college is also big with greenery.

individual_reviews.title: COLLEGE – A Beautiful Journey.

content.Placements: 45 students are in our batch, and the courses we join in the institute have very broad aspects. When you further move into the college, the average placement is about 2.5 LPA. Most of the students join companies outside of the college. Last year, there were no students placed in any company in my college because most students move further for higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are available in the college. The hostel is not very bad but not very good. Wi-Fi is available on every floor of the hostel. The structure of the building is quite good, and every department has its own library. Every department has its own buildings, and the most important thing is that sports activities are organized in our college. There are different grounds for activities, and the institute also has two canteens.

admission_overview.college_name: HRIT Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: HRIT University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: HRIT University admissions are based on entrance exam and merit of the candidates. The university conducts HRIT HNAT test to shortlist candidates for admission. Besides, the university also accepts scores in UGAT, PG admission test conducted by AKTU, etc. HRIT University offers courses at UG, PG, diploma and doctoral levels. The university offers programmes across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Arts, Science, etc.

eligibility_selection.title: HRIT University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Candidates can apply for the preferred course online. The university shortlists candidates based on their scores in university or national-level entrance test. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for popular HRIT University courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Intermediate exam of UP Board or Class 12 exam or its equivalent with Physics and Mathematics and one of the optional subjects-Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category)
Bachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years from any recognised university or its equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates)
BCA/ BSc/ BCom/ BCA of a minimum of 3 years with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates)
BE/ BTech in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate or equivalent CGPA
courses_table.selection_criteria: PG Admission Test conducted by AKTU + Counselling/ HRIT HNAT Test

faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Intermediate exam of UP Board or Class 12 exam or its equivalent with Physics and Mathematics and one of the optional subjects-Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for BTech course at HRIT University.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at HRIT University?

paragraphs: HRIT University admissions are open currently. Candidates can check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
1. Application Process
Aspirants can apply on the official website of university. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 for a course.
2. Selection

The university reviews the application form of the candidates to confirm their eligibility. HRIT University conducts HRIT HNAT Test to select candidates for admission. Besides, the university also accepts scores in UGAT, PG Admission Test conducted by AKTU, GPAT, etc. for specific courses.
3. Counselling & Admission Confirmation

Aspirants selected based on PG Admission Test of AKTU are offered seats via counselling. For all other courses, candidates receive an email about their selection. Candidates need to report at the campus with the documents and pay theHRIT University feesto confirm their seat. Check below the documents required at the time of admission:
lists: Original Allotment Letter (if this seat is allotted via counselling)
Migration Certificate (if not passed Class 12 from UP Board)
Affidavit in case of any gap in study
Caste Certificate for SC, ST, OBC only
Graduation/ diploma marksheets of all years

courses_data.name: HRIT University BTech Admission 2025
cutoff_tables: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering
B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering
courses_data.description: HRIT University offers a four-year BTech course at the UG level. The course is spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech inCSE, CSE with IBM,AI & ML, Cyber Security, Data Science & Cloud Computing, etc. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with compulsory and optional subjects with at least 50% aggregate can apply for this course. The university also offers lateral entry to BTech course.

faqs.question: Does HRIT University offer lateral entry to BTech?
faqs.answer: HRIT University does offer lateral entry to BTech course. Aspirants who have completed a three-year Diploma in Engineering with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for BTech (LE). Aspirants who have passed a three-year BSc can also apply.

courses_data.name: HRIT University MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, CMAT, CAT, CUET-PG, JEECUP
courses_data.description: HRIT University offers MBA for two-years at the PG level. The university offers MBA General, Healthcare Management, Business Analytics (Industry Integrated) and Digital Marketing (Industry Integrated). Admission to MBA is based on HRIT HNAT Test scores of the candidates.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at HRIT University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass bachelor's degree of a minimum of three years from any recognised university or its equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates) to apply for MBA at HRIT University.

courses_data.name: HRIT University MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, CMAT, CAT, CUET-PG, JEECUP
courses_data.description: HRIT University offers MBA for two-years at the PG level. The university offers MBA General, Healthcare Management, Business Analytics (Industry Integrated) and Digital Marketing (Industry Integrated). Admission to MBA is based on HRIT HNAT Test scores of the candidates.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at HRIT University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass bachelor's degree of a minimum of three years from any recognised university or its equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates) to apply for MBA at HRIT University.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at HRIT University without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: HRIT University conducts HRIT HNAT Test to shortlist candidates for admission. The university also accepts scores in GPAT, UGAT, PG Admission Test conducted by AKTU, etc. for specific programmes. Hence, admission to most of the courses is entrance-based.

reviews.review_text: All labs were neat and clean but non-AC. Wi-Fi was not working on the campus of HRIT. Classroom was average and projector class was good. Seminar halls were very good. Library was also average but all books were available for study. College canteen was also very big and had good service.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for a bright future.
reviews.review_text: The campus was well-maintained with modern classrooms, labs, and a high-speed Wi-Fi facility. The library had a wide range of academic resources. The hostel facilities were decent, with good food in the mess and basic medical services available. Sports facilities and common rooms were also available for relaxation.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average private college. Those who want to study B.Tech or B. Pharm can go to this college.
reviews.review_text: The food and hostel quality were below average. There was no medical facility. There were only a few sports to play. The infrastructure was poor, with no Wi-Fi, no AC and labs with only a few equipment. There were no smart boards or computers. Classrooms and washrooms were damaged, with no water. There was a playground and open badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members of our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is also very good. There are 5 Wi-Fi connections in our hostel. The mess food is also tasty. There is no ragging in our college. The environment of our college is very good. The ground of our college is also big with greenery.

reviews.review_heading: COLLEGE – A Beautiful Journey.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are available in the college. The hostel is not very bad but not very good. Wi-Fi is available on every floor of the hostel. The structure of the building is quite good, and every department has its own library. Every department has its own buildings, and the most important thing is that sports activities are organized in our college. There are different grounds for activities, and the institute also has two canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for those who really wants to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. The college has all labs of all departments. But the only problem is that the majority of the classrooms are non-AC in 2024 (they are improving infrastructure). Library is fine; all the libraries have AC and almost all types of books are available, from accounting to normal standard books.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is not good and the classes are not well maintained.
reviews.review_text: The pharmacy department is not well maintained. Lab equipment is missing, and they provide expired chemicals for experiments. Wi-Fi is not available, and the canteen menu is not very extensive. There are two canteens on campus, but neither has adequate seating.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the library are not air-conditioned. Mess and canteen are available but the food quality is not good. Medical facilities and sports events are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of HRIT Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very huge, but not well-organised. Our college has a library. There is no sports ground in our college. Wi-Fi won't work at any time. There is no lab work done in our college. The food served in the canteen and hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of HRIT Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Free, unlimited Wi-Fi is available. The ground is good. Many types of sports, like shooting ball, volleyball, and cricket, are conducted. Good water is available. There is proper management at the hostel. The food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the campus infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and its building is very good. All labs are well-maintained. Computers have very old windows operating systems. The library is very huge. All books are available in the library. The food served in the mess is good. Our college campus has 3 sports grounds and 2 canteens. Our college has an 8-ball pool table.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the way of teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is adequate, but the services provided could be improved. The library has only course books available. Wi-Fi is available only to teachers. The quality of food served in the hostel mess is not good and hygienic so the canteen is a better option. Sports and games facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good value for money. Our teachers provide us with knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Classrooms are good. The furniture and structure of our college buildings are good. Sports grounds and cricket grounds are available in our college for sports. Canteens are good.

reviews.review_heading: College is okay for graduation but not advised for PG.
reviews.review_text: There are very poor facilities available like as no Wi-Fi for students and not classrooms are also not much smart and in library, there are not much books available related to my course. Hostel facilities are also bad as food available is very unhygienic .

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides Wi-Fi for staff only. Our library is not well-maintained. The hostel facilities are not good. The food served in the mess and canteen is not hygienic.

college_info.intro:
SGBAU Amravati popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech and BSc students are placed in top companies in top sectors. BTech students are given technical knowledge and are trained in advanced technology. The aim of the university is to build a strong research and teaching environment for students. BTech and BSc students are provided with various facilities such as a Research lab, Computer Science Society, Training and Placement Cell, and others.
Overall, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. BTech students can also go for non-technical fields such as Sales, Marketing, and others. Check out the below video to know more:
Below mentioned are some of the Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University courses and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Pursuing the BA degree designed by SGBAU provides graduates with a broad career scope. After completion of this programme, BA graduates can pursue different career paths such as Social worker, Teacher, Content Writer, and more. Each career path helps students achieve attractive earnings. Mentioned below is a list of various job profiles for BA degree holders to pursue and their corresponding average salaries:Journalist: INR 3 LPA to INR 5.5 LPATeacher: INR 4 LPA to INR 6.5 lakhHuman Resour
faqs.question: What are the prospects of doing BA from SGBAU?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University does provide placement support to students officially pursuing any programme from the university. For helping the students, the university has established a placement cell. The cell maintains strategic relations with many reputed companies to provide quality on-campus placement opportunities. Apart from this, the placement cell serves as a catalyst for training and skill enhancement of students.
faqs.question: Does SGBAU provide placement support and training to its students?

faqs.answer: A:    As per information collated from official sources, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University offers a BA programme via more than 10 affiliated colleges. Thus, the university boasts a high number of seats for admission to BA courses. Among all the colleges/institutes, Gulamnabi Azhad Arts Commerce College has the highest intake, with 3,480 seats.
faqs.question: Which affiliated college of SGBAU has the highest seat intake for BA course?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the official website of SGBAU, the placement cell of the university maintains good relations with reputed organisations. As per the student reviews, many top recruiters have visited the university's campus for recruiting students enrolled in the BCom programme. course_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MBA programme at SGBAU?
course_faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for SGBAU MBA courses range from INR 33,000 to INR 1.7 lakh. This happens because the university offers this MBA programme via its many affiliated colleges. The tuition fees charged by different institutes differ.Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per official sources. However, it is subject to change.

course_faqs.question: Can SGBAU Amravati MBA students avail any scholarships?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, students enrolled in the SGBAU Amravati MBA programme are eligible for various national and state-level scholarships offered by the GOI. Some of the national and state-level scholarships available for students to avail include Govt. of India Divyangjan, KIshorVaigyanik, ProtsahanYojana, PG Scholarship for the professional course for SC/ST, Umbrella Scholarship, and more.

overview_faqs.question: How much does MBA at SGBAU cost?
overview_faqs.answer: SGBAU Amravati has 30 departments that offer certificate, undergraduate, graduate, and PhD level programmes in science, engineering, management, business, education, the arts, law, and lifelong learning. It offers a 2 years MBA programme with specializations in Financial Management, Marketing Management, Human Resources Management, Production and Operations Management. The total fees for the MBA programme at SGBAU is INR 80,600. A bachelor's degree in any field with at least 50% of the required courses completed is required for entrance to the MBA program.You can read more information about the MBA programme at Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University on the following site - https://www.shiksha.com/university/sant-gadge-baba-amravati-university-22416/courses

review_summary.college_name: SGBAU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I suggest students get admission here.

content.Placements: I am a 2nd year student, so I don't know that much. Students should score upto 6.5 or 6 CGPA to be eligible for an interview in my course. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 9 LPA in my course. Faculty members try to give internships to many students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very good. All facilities are provided, such as labs, classrooms, and a library. There are smart boards in all classrooms. Food available in the canteen and mess is good. Medical facilities are also provided. Students are able to play games here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College infrastructure, canteen and hostel facilities are the best. Faculty is the best.

content.Placements: 30-40% students are placed. On the institute level, more than a few hundred students are working abroad in more than 150 countries. The environment here so good as it is in the outskirts of the city. There are trees, a garden, and many more things.
content.Infrastructure: Badminton court, table tennis court, chess boards and playing zone, carrom boards and playing zone, cricket, volleyball, basketball, football, Kabaddi. The college canteen provides decent food at affordable prices. Mess food is the best. Just Rs. 60 unlimited thali, with proper salad, Dal, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: We will find that the subject they are teaching in the course is useless.

content.Placements: Not every student gets placed. The chance of getting placed is almost 30-40 percent. The highest package offered ranges from 12-14 LPA, and the average package ranges from 3-4 LPA. The lowest package offered to students is 1 LPA, which is not good in this economy. It is very hard to get a placement.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel in college when I joined. The infrastructure needs to improve. Classrooms are of an old type, like houses in the old Japanese movies. The campus doesn't feel like we are in college, and it needs to improve a lot in the next few years.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you are from Amravati then definitely go through this college.

content.Placements: First of all BCA means Bachelor in Computer Applications. This course is completed in 3 years. The average package offer is a minimum of 3 to 4 LPA and I think so the highest package is 7 LPA. Percentage matter atleast CGPA above 6 or 6.5, which means 65 to 60 percent.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are provided by our college, including good classroom high tech Wi-Fi technology brilliant computer labs. In our library there are all types of books present. In the hostels the food is also good and of good quality. We have good sports opportunities in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college with helpful faculty, placements, and modern facilities.

content.Placements: The placement process in our college is decent and improving every year. Placement eligibility criteria require a minimum of 60 percent throughout academics. Around 60 percent or more students from our course get placed every year. The lowest package offered is around 3 LPA, and the highest package goes up to 7–8 LPA, depending on skills and performance. The average package is around 4–5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include ISRO, Infosys, TCS, Tata, Mahindra, and other IT and core companies. Many students also get internship opportunities during their course.

admission_overview.college_name: SGBAU Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Application Process

paragraphs: SGBAU admissionto various UG, PG, diploma, certification and PhD courses is through online mode. Interested candidates can apply by filling out the application forms available on the official website. Through its 27 departments of study, the university offers a total of 941 courses in streams likeEngineering, Science, Management, Commerce, Education, Law and Library Information Science.Read the following article to learn about the courses, eligibility, and admission procedure ofSant Gadge Baba Amravati University.

SGBAU course admissionis subject to fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria. The university offers a wide range of courses across multiple specialisations. Admission to different courses is either based on merit or on the valid scores of national/state-level entrance exams. The university for many courses grants admission through Common Admission Programme (CAP). Check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularSGBAU courses:

The total tuition fee for SGBAU is inclusive of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, medical insurance, security deposit, and more. Some of the components need to be paid only once at the time of admission, while the remaining components are charged either semester-wise/ yearly.SGBAU feeranges betweenINR 4,000andINR 4.6 lakh. The fee varies depending on the programme and specialisation selected by the student. Interested students can look at the following table to know about the Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University:

Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University seat intakevaries as per the programme and specialisation selected by the students. The university offers seats through its various affiliated colleges. In order to confirm your seat at the university, students are required to pay the admission fee. Check out the below table to know the seat intake for some of the popular programmes offered at SGBAU:
Course Name
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subjective.

Admission to Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University is a multi-step process that involves application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students are required to clear the admission criteria before applying for the programme of choice. The university offers admissions through the Centralised Admission Programme for some of its programmes. Check out the following steps to complete theSGBAU admission process:
Step 1: SGBAU Application Process
Visit the official website of the university and apply for the programme of choice. Duly fill in the application form by providing the required details and uploading the specified documents.
Step 2: SGBAU Selection Process

SGBAU shortlists students based on several parameters, such as entrance exam scores, past academic qualifications, etc. Students must appear and clear the course-specific entrance test to be eligible for admission. Seat allotment for certain programmes is done through counselling conducted by the concerned authority.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates must pay the admission fee and go through document verification to secure their spot at the university.

faqs.answer: At Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University, students can pursue a wide range of M.Tech and ME programmes. These courses are offered via various affiliated colleges of the university. faqs.answer: Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University accepted entrance exams are JEE Main,MHT CET, CBSE 12th,Maharashtra HSC, ICAR AIEEA, and others. For prior preparation, candidates must read the JEE Main books, attempt as manyJEE Main question papersas possible.

placement_data.title: SGBAU Amravati Placement overview
paragraphs: What’s new at SGBAU placements 2023? SGBAU placement report 2023 is not released. However, according to Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during SGBAU UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 2.11 LPA and INR 2.40 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 18 students were placed out of 44 students during SGBAU UG 4-year placements 2022.
SGBAU Placements 2022

data: SGBAU Placements 2022 A fall of over 45% was witnessed in the UG 4-year median package offered in 2022 as compared with 2021 A fall of nearly 33% was witnessed in the PG 2-year median package offered in 2022 as compared with 2021

faqs.question: Does SGBAU offer better placements than PKDV?
faqs.answer: The median package offered for SGBAU's UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements in 2022 was INR 2.11 LPA and INR 2.40 LPA, respectively, according to Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University's NIRF report 2023. Additionally, at the SGBAU UG 4-year placements in 2022, a total of 18 students were placed out of 44 students. The largest package (12 LPA) in the placement drive of 2022 was recorded by PDKV Akola. Top employers include Reliance Foundation, Mahindra, IFFCO, Bayer Crop Science, and others. Hence, PKDV has a better placement cell and placement opportunities.

faqs.question: Which affiliated college of Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University has the highest seat intake for BCom?
faqs.answer: As per information sources from official sources, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University has more than 10 affiliated colleges offering the BCom programme. Thus, in total the university has 26,332 seats available for BCom. Among all the colleges/institutes, Shri Mithulalji Kacholiya Commerce And Shri Satyanarayanji Ramkrushnaji Rathi Science College has the highest intake with 1,080 seats.

faqs.question: Does SGBAU provide placement support and training to its students?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University does provide placement support to students officially pursuing any programme from the university. For helping the students, the university has established a placement cell. The cell maintains strategic relations with many reputed companies to provide quality on-campus placement opportunities. Apart from this, the placement cell serves as a catalyst for training and skill enhancement of students.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for BCom programme at SGBAU?
faqs.answer: As per the official website of SGBAU, the placement cell of the university maintains good relations with reputed organisations. As per the student reviews, many top recruiters have visited the university's campus for recruiting students enrolled in the BCom programme. Some of the top recruiters sourced from student reviews are TCS, Wipro, AD Electronics, and more.

average_package.title: SGBAU Average Package 2023

faqs.question: Can Dhoot Transmission and Bajaj Electricals be considered as some of the top recruiters of SGBAU?
faqs.answer: Candidates might get respectable placement possibilities at Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University. Campus placement drives are open to students in their final year of study. In addition to placing students, the institution offers internships in a number of companies, such as Dotcom, JK Innovation, Mindspark, Webveer Technology, Maestro, and others. SGBAU placements' salient features include the following: The highest CTC available to applicants is between INR 8 and INR 9 Lacs per annum. While the lowest CTC offered to candidates is approximately INR 2.4 LPA, the average CTC offered to candidates is approximately INR 3 LPA. Among the top employers are Amazon, Backend, Apsara Chemicals, Dhoot Transmission, Bajaj Electricals, and Bigbasket. Among the industries in which students were placed were the automotive, IT, software, transportation, construction, education, and clinical research sectors.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at SGBAU cost?
faqs.answer: SGBAU Amravati has 30 departments that offer certificate, undergraduate, graduate, and PhD level programmes in science, engineering, management, business, education, the arts, law, and lifelong learning. It offers a 2 years MBA programme with specializations in Financial Management, Marketing Management, Human Resources Management, Production and Operations Management. The total fees for the MBA programme at SGBAU is INR 80,600. A bachelor's degree in any field with at least 50% of the required courses completed is required for entrance to the MBA program. You can read more information about the MBA programme at Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University on the following site - https://www.shiksha.com/university/sant-gadge-baba-amravati-university-22416/courses

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fees to pursue BSc from SGBAU?
faqs.answer: Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University BSc fee structure is a composition of multiple fee components. Out of all, one of the prominent fee components is the tuition fees. As per the structure, the total tuition fees for BSc amount to INR 31,600 . Students willing to know the complete fee structure can visit the official website of the university. Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

faqs.question: Which affiliated college of SGBAU Amravati has the highest seat intake for MBA?
faqs.answer: SGBAU Amravati offers an MBA programme via one constituent and four affiliated colleges. Some of the colleges affiliated with the university are PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology (PRPCET), Vidya Prasarini Sabhas Arts, and more. Out of all, Prof. Ram Meghe Institute of Technology and Research offers the highest number of MBA seats, i.e., 120 .

college_info.intro:
MKU Madurai offers a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral levels in the fields of Biomedical Sciences, Biotechnology, Business Studies, Information Technology, Performing Arts, and Tamil Studies, among many others.
At the PG level, the MSc and MBA courses offered by MKU Madurai are top-rated among the students. MK University Madurai offers a two-year MSc programme in more than 15 specialisations including Genomics, Biochemistry, Chemistry, Geography, Computer Science, and Visual Communication, among others. The university also offers a two-year MBA programme in three specialisations, namely, General Management, Hospital Administration, and Tourism & Hotel Management through its Business Studies school.
Distance Education of Madurai Kamaraj University comprises the low-cost programmes offered by the university in distance mode. These programmes are very popular among students because of their easy accessibility. The university offers BA, BCom, and BSc courses at the UG level in various streams. The popular Madurai Kamaraj Distance Education PG programmes include MBA, MCA, and MSc courses.
It also offers a distance MBA programme in different specialisations including FM, HRM, Operations and Project Management, among others.
Check out the popular programmes along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fees in the table below:
For more information about Madurai Kamaraj University check out the below videos:

MKU Madurai releases its cut-off lists annually for the candidates seeking admission to the university. The university determines the cut-off depending on the number of candidates and the seats available.

Candidates must go through the eligibility criteria of the university for the course they wish to enrol in and should also apply for the entrance exams accepted by the university.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
MKU Madurai offers courses at UG, PG, diploma, certificate and doctoral levels. The university offers courses through School of Biological Sciences, School of Indian Languages, and School of Business Studies, among others. MK University Madurai also offers both UG and PG-level distance learning programmes.

The university has over 109 affiliated colleges offering various UG courses to the students, such as BA in English, History, Economics, and Political Science; BSc in Biochemistry, Computer Science, and Mathematics; BCom, and BCA.

faqs.answer: A:    Madurai Kamaraj University offers MBA and MCA admission via its affiliated colleges based on the TANCET entrance exam. During the Madurai Kamaraj University TANCET cutoff 2025, the last round cutoff rank for MBA admission via Senthil Kumar Nadar College, Virudhunagar was 4412. This cutoff rank is valid for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For admission to the MCA course, the required cutoff rank was 1448 at Arul Anandar College.

faqs.answer: A:    No, MKU DDE does not provide a refund of fees if a student wishes to cancel or withdraw his/her admission. However, the institute may provide a refund of fees in the following cases:Duplicate payments: If students have accidentally made duplicate payments for the same programme, they are entitled to a refund of duplicate payment.Processing errors: If an error has been made in processing a student's payment that results in an overcharge or incorrect amount being deducted, then the particular student is entitled to a refund of duplicate payment.Service cancellation: In case the institute decided to cancel the programme, any fees paid by  the students are refunded.

Since this is a residential programme where hostel accommodation is mandatory, the hostel fees amount to INR 3 lakhs. overview_faqs.answer: Madurai Kamaraj University refund procedure is easy. Students need to contact the customer support within 10 days of payment. The amount will be credited to the payment account.

overview_faqs.question: Is MKUDDE, Madurai a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: MADURAI KAMARAJ institution is a well-known institution founded by the Tamil Nadu government in 1965. The admission process at MKU-DDE is fairly basic. Simply go to the website, download the admission form, and then submit it online or offline. Admission is usually granted in the month of April. If you want to study from home and have been admitted to IGNOU, you can do so. You may get additional information from its official website, which I also visited. I shall always remember this college favorably. This is the most amazing experience I've ever had. Seniors, staff, and administration will assist you in any way they can. The teachers' teaching abilities are exceptional. You will never get anything back from a teacher. Learning here has a very good atmosphere.

paragraphs: Madurai Kamaraj University feesis inclusive of various fee elements. To confirm admission, pay the first installement of fees. Various modes of payment are available. The table below mentions theMadurai Kamaraj University feesand average package for various UG & PG courses:
Note: This information is taken from official sources/ sanctioning bodies and is subjective.

The number of seats depends on the course. To secure a seat at the university students must participate in the counselling. Students can check out the following table to learn about the total seat intake for some of the popular Madurai Kamaraj University Dharwad courses:

Before applying, students are advised to read all the instructions mentioned in the prospectus. The Most Important Thing to Note: Multiple programmes will require different applications to be completed with different registration fees depending on the type of programme. Check below to know the admission process.
1- Application Process 2025

Those who wish to apply for multiple programmes have to apply separately online. The registration fee is different for the types of programmes applied, which are INR 300/- for non-entrance programmes and INR 800/- for entrance-based PG programmes.
2- Selection Procedure

For PG programmes for which entrance is necessary — 50% weightage on the entrance examination conducted by Madurai Kamaraj University and 50% weightage on UG marks up to the 5th semester. The selection for the Non-Entrance PG programme is based on UG marks up to the 2nd year or 5 semesters. M.A/M.Com and any other courses or other courses like MBA and M.P.Ed. may require more rounds of selection like interviews, group discussion, and practical exams.
3- Publication of Selection
The list of selected and waitlist candidates will be released on the website of Madurai Kamaraj University and displayed outside the counselling hall.

courses_data.name: Madurai Kamaraj University BEd Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The B.Ed. program that is offered at Madurai Kamaraj University caters to in-service teachers that hold a UG degree and any of the qualifications, D.T.Ed. or B.P.Ed. It is offered in distance education form by the Directorate of Distance Education and also takes two years for completion. The curriculum includes essential papers centered upon childhood development, modern educational practices, and evaluation methods, also pedagogical subjects that span areas like Tamil, English, Mathematics, and Science education.

faqs.question: Is B.Ed available at Madurai Kamaraj University?
faqs.answer: Madurai Kamaraj University provides a Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) course from its Directorate of Distance Education. The course is of two years duration for undergraduate level students and thus provides a flexible learning experience for those who intend to be educators.

faqs.question: What is the refund procedure at Madurai Kamaraj University?
faqs.answer: Madurai Kamaraj University refund procedure is easy. Students need to contact the customer support within 10 days of payment. The amount will be credited to the payment account.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Madurai Kamaraj University offers?
faqs.answer: Madurai Kamaraj University offers a vast range of undergraduate and postgraduate programmes to students, including 44 PG,  40 MPhil,  57 PhD programmes, and 17 diploma/ PG diploma/certificate courses. The courses include MBA. MSc, BSc, BCom, MA, BA, MCom, BCA, UG Diploma, etc. Candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility criteria for MKU admissions.

faqs.question: How can I join Madurai Kamaraj University?
faqs.answer: To join Madurai Kamaraj University, you must first see the eligibility criteria for your programme, i.e.,  10+2+3… for P.G. etc. courses. To begin with, go to the official website of the university after which complete the application form online. Finally, upload the required documents and pay the registration fee, unless exempted. For entrance-based programmes, please appear for the entrance test in the mentioned centres as your selection will be based on the entrance test and academic performances. After checking the results, check the selection list of the University and get ready for document verification and fee payment. Detailed and accurate information should not create any problems during the process.

faqs.question: Can I join MKU DDE without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Directorate of Distance Education, Madurai Kamaraj University admission is done through merit based. Students qualify the eligibility criteria set by the university as per the course.

faqs.question: Does Madurai Kamaraj University offer placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University provides placement opportunities. The University has released the NIRF report 2024. According to the report, 226 PG 2-years and 17 PG 5-years students were placed during Madurai Kamaraj University placements 2023. Further, the median package offered to PG 2-years and PG 5-years students during Madurai Kamaraj University placements 2023 was INR 2.55 LPA and INR 1.80 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Madurai Kamaraj University?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered during Madurai Kamaraj University placements 2023 is yet to be published on the official website. Once it is released, it will be updated on this page. Meanwhile, let’s take a look at the median packages offered during Madurai Kamaraj University placements 2023 in the table below: Course Median Package (2023) PG 2-years INR 2.55 LPA PG 5-years INR 1.80 LPA Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Madurai Kamaraj University NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Madurai Kamaraj University?
faqs.answer: Madurai Kamaraj University offers a decent placement rate, with students from almost all the courses getting placement assistance. During Madurai Kamaraj University placements 2023, a total of 226 PG 2-years and 17 PG 5-years students were placed in reputed companies. The key highlights of Madurai Kamaraj University placements for the Class 2022 and 2023 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Median package (PG 2-years) (MBA, MSc, MA, etc.) INR 2.15 LPA INR 2.55 LPA Total students (PG 2-years) 677 740 Total students placed (PG 2-years) 215 226 Median package (PG 5-years) INR 1.44 LPA INR 1.80 LPA Total students (PG 5-years) 7 17 Total students placed (PG 5-years) 7 17 Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Madurai Kamaraj University NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How are the placements for MBA finance at MKU?
faqs.answer: MBA in Finance helps candidates to grow in asset management, financial advisory, retail banking, and especially when they have passed from top MBA institutes which offer a stable career throughout. After completing the MBA in Finance degree from Madurai Kamraj university, students will get ability to draft, strategies and develop disruptive financial innovations using the appropriate tools and techniques, and hypothesize about the effect new regulations will have on future commerce products. The Programme will enable students to have an in-depth understanding of the future of money, markets and transactions, as well as the mental tools and frameworks required to predict and leverage future trends in FinTech. Career Scope: University will provide internship in different domain like: filing tax, working on CIBIL scores, equity trading, Financial modelling, portfolio management and many more. As far as the placement is concerned, companies like Deloitte, Ernst and Young, ITC, Nestle etc.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at Madurai Kamaraj University placements?
faqs.answer: The Madurai Kamaraj University average package offered during the 2024 placement drive is yet to be released on the official website. However, the median package offered in 2023 placements is disclosed in the NIRF report 2024. Check out the below table for course-wise median packages offered during Madurai Kamaraj University placements 2023: Course Median Package (2023) PG 2-years INR 2.55 LPA PG 5-years INR 1.280 LPA Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Madurai Kamaraj University NIRF report 2024. The course-wise median package trends witnessed during Madurai Kamaraj University placements between 2021 and 2023 are presented below: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) PG 2-years INR 1.92 LPA INR 2.15 LPA INR 2.55 LPA PG 2-years INR 1.80 LPA INR 1.44 LPA INR 1.80 LPA Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Madurai Kamaraj University NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BA at MKU DDE?
faqs.answer: As per official sources, the total tuition fee to pursue BA courses ranges from INR 9,000 to INR 1.2 lakh .

faqs.question: Can I get a fee refund at MKU DDE?
faqs.answer: No, MKU DDE does not provide a refund of fees if a student wishes to cancel or withdraw his/her admission. However, the institute may provide a refund of fees in the following cases: Duplicate payments: If students have accidentally made duplicate payments for the same programme, they are entitled to a refund of duplicate payment. Processing errors : If an error has been made in processing a student's payment that results in an overcharge or incorrect amount being deducted, then the particular student is entitled to a refund of duplicate payment. Service cancellation: In case the institute decided to cancel the programme, any fees paid by the students are refunded.

faqs: What is the cutoff of Madurai Kamaraj University?
What is the Madurai Kamaraj University TANCET cutoff 2025 for MBA? I belong to OBC category.
description: Madurai Kamaraj University cutoff 2025 is available on this page. Students can view the cutoffs for different exams, courses and specialisations from the exam-wise sections given below. Madurai Kamaraj University Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories. To know more, see the sections below. Other exam-related updates are as follows:

Madurai Kamaraj University offers MBA and MCA courses via its affiliated colleges. Admission is based on candidates' performance in the TANCET entrance exam, followed by the counselling process. During the MKU TANCET cutoff 2025, the last round cutoff rank was 1448 for MCA admission at Arul Anandar College. This rank is valid for the students belonging to the General AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view the important TANCET 2026 dates for MBA and MCA courses. Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) is an admission test conducted for PG admissions at the state level in Tamil Nadu. Check out the table below:

Madurai Kamaraj University admission to the MBA and MCA courses is based on a valid TANCET entrance exam score. Candidates who participated in the exam are only eligible for the counselling rounds. Aspirants preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view the TANCET year-wise cutoff PDFs to understand the past years' cutoff trends.

highlights.description: Madurai Kamaraj University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #85 in the University category, and #31 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Madurai Kamaraj University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 18th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
Madurai Kamaraj University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Madurai Kamaraj University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Madurai Kamaraj University fell 22 ranks to #85 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Madurai Kamaraj University fell 5 ranks to #31 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Madurai Kamaraj University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

hostel_campus.college_name: Madurai Kamaraj University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
University has Four men's hostel are named as Bharathi, Kavimani, Bharathidasan, Thiruvalluvar. The Bharathi hostel has 108 rooms and the Kavimani hostels 60 rooms respectively. The Bharathidasan Hostel and Thiruvalluvar hostels have 59 rooms respectively. The Thiruvalluvar hostel is a residential hostel for MBA students. The V.O.C hostel has got 124 rooms and 8 common halls. 
There are 385 students accommodated in the PG Hostels Bharathi, Kavimani, Bharathidasan and Thiruvalluvar Hostels and 130 Ph.D. Scholars are staying in the V.O.C Host.

Madurai Kamaraj University women’s hostel blocks are named as Kurinji, Thamarai and Malligai. These three blocks contain 317 well-furnished double accommodation rooms with more than 487 inmates including 69 Research Scholars, 330 PG students and 88 M.Phil. scholars belongs to various disciplines like Arts, Humanities, Sciences, Computer Application, Business Administration, Library Science and Physical Education offered by the University.

library.description: The University has a modernized central Library with 300839 books, 15,000 e-journals, 3,000 e-books, 55,000 reference and text books. The one Gbps internet connection, INFONET centre with 50 nodes and smart class rooms have enriched the ICT enabled teaching and learning.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Hockey Turf

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Lady Doak CollegeReviewed on 30 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, placement, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and courses available are of very good quality, and labs are very updated with up-to-date technology. The hostel facilities are the best and carefully maintained. They provide the best quality food that suits everyone. Overall, the best infrastructure and hostel service.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Parvathy’s Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 18 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is totally not worth joining, and does not have placements. Choose the college wisely.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay because they have only 3 blocks. I think that's not enough. It does not have any Wi-Fi facility. There are a lot of systems in the lab, but none of them work properly. Some systems may not work, and some systems don't have a keyboard or mouse. Only a few systems work properly. There are many students in one class, and how will students work in the lab and complete the coding tasks when the systems are not sufficient? The library is pretty good. I don't know much about the ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Virudhunagar Hindu Nadars' Senthikumara Nadar CollegeReviewed on 17 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College in my native zone.
reviews.review_text: The capacities for accommodation are usually lower than 500, which includes both the girls and boys hostels. Some of the luxurious facilities like shuttle clubs swimming pool and gym are also arranged for the students to make them physically fit and to feel relaxed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Fatima College (FC Madurai)
reviews.review_heading: This career is good for my future.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of infrastructure are too good. The Wi-Fi connection is something we do not know about because Fatima College will not allow mobile phones. The classrooms and Labs are good and the library is a place to relax. I do not know about the hostel but the food tastes good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Fatima College (FC Madurai)
reviews.review_heading: This career is good for me.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is used by teachers and faculty members, students won't use it because our college won't allow mobile phones. Classrooms and library places are there to relax and freshen our minds.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Fatima College (FC Madurai)
reviews.review_heading: Simply, my career is good for me.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar, so I don’t know about the hostel. The infrastructure is good. Labs, classrooms, and library are good. The library is a good place to relax and read many books. I don’t know about the Wi-Fi connection because we don’t use mobile phones during class hours.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Fatima College (FC Madurai)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the curriculum, education, faculty, and overall experience.
reviews.review_text: Mobile phones are restricted in our college, so the free Wi-Fi is not very helpful. Still, we can access the library books and labs with the ID scanner at any working time. Our hostel consists of 700 students, where we actually get good quality food and provisions of medical facilities, often once a week. Sports players are highly encouraged, and even normal students are appreciated for playing.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by N.M.S. Sermathai Vasan College For WomenReviewed on 6 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Don't join in the NMS Sermathai Vasan College for Women.
reviews.review_text: This college is located in the innermost place where only a bus will be available per day. Otherwise, we will book an auto or cab but auto charges 200. The hostel food is very poor, and it causes health issues. The food is limited, and it is very bad. Most of the students leave the hostel after eating food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Ayya Nadar Janaki Ammal CollegeReviewed on 2 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Average placements, supportive faculty members, and balanced campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our college has smart classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and a central library with digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms, 24X7 water, and good security. The mess and canteen food is average but hygienic, offering both veg and non-veg options. We also have medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities for overall students' wellness.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Yadava CollegeReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good staff, and they teach very well.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing. Such a beautiful campus and a nice ecosystem. There are so many trees, and the food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available in the college. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Yadava CollegeReviewed on 27 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent academic, needs placement improvement, but the food is average.
reviews.review_text: Classroom infrastructure is good, and the Wi-Fi is excellent. The facilities in our college are good, with average food but good quality. The canteen always has food and snacks available. Healthy food and medical facilities are always available in our college; anyone with a problem immediately has access to the medical room, first aid facility, and doctor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Ayya Nadar Janaki Ammal CollegeReviewed on 21 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is the best college, with really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our department and the hostel. The lab facilities are good. The classrooms are good and clean. The library is also good. So, there are all good facilities and great infrastructure. The hostel food quality is good, and the canteen food quality is also good. The medical facilities are available, and sports and games facilities are of good quality.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Lady Doak CollegeReviewed on 15 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for women.
reviews.review_text: They provide rooms with restrooms in the hostels. The quality of food is very good. They provide food three times a day with evening snacks and tea. The infrastructure is also very nice. There are separate blocks for each department. Wi-Fi is free. Labs are available with safety measures. Libraries are available for each department, and there is a common library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by The American CollegeReviewed on 13 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Student review for American College.
reviews.review_text: Our college comprises numerous departments for both aided and self-finance students. Each department boasts separate Wi-Fi, a library, and classrooms, while the science department is equipped with labs. Infrastructure-wise, our college features a wide-ranging campus. The hostel food was above average for both students and staff.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Meenakshi Government Arts College For WomenReviewed on 8 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: If you're struggling with financial problems, truly this is a very good college for learning.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure are good, well-maintained, clean, and safe. Overall, the canteen, mess, and medical facilities were the best here. Also, when it comes to sports, our college has won many state-level and national-level prizes, and two NCC students met our Prime Minister Mr. Narendra Modi ji, and participated in the parade in Delhi.

content.Faculty: All the teachers are Ph.D. holders. The semester exams are not so difficult. I would not recommend this course, because of the lack of placements.

individual_reviews.title: It provides good placements for college and the best for academics.

content.Placements: Placements are good but they should increase their percentage of placements in the upcoming years. Recruiting companies are Cognizant, IBM, Infosys, HCL, etc. They are making their best effort to get internships for students.

Hostel facilities and infrastructure are good. Canteen and mess food are in acceptable taste. Students have games like football, volleyball, cricket, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: School of Life Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: VELS University has separate hostel facility for boys and girls. Laundry facility is available to the students on chargeable basis. Mess and Canteen facility is also available for the inmates at reasonable rates.

library.description:
VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies has a fully automated central library with a seating capacity of 500 persons and follows Open Access System. The library has a collection of 114305 books, 137717 e-books, and 10032 back volumes. It has the subscription of more than 359 Periodicals (National & International), more than 12381 e-journals, 4106 dissertations, 4849 audio-visual resources.
It also facilitates access to e-journals from IEEE/IEL, ASME, ASCE, EBSCO, ProQuest, BENTHAM Science Pharmacy, Micromedex’s Drugdex System, Inventi Online, Nature Online, Law finder, NPTEL etc.
The library is also an associate member of Madras Library Network (MALIBNET) and Institutional member British Council Library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Hockey Ground, Recreation Room for Indoor Games

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure could be improved, and good placements last year.
reviews.review_text: The whole college is divided into particular blocks for certain courses. Some newly built blocks are very comfortable, but the block I am in, the first building made, is honestly not the ideal block to have classrooms in. I come from Lucknow, and it is sort of difficult for me at the start, but now I have adjusted to hostel life. It has been a hard journey, but overall, the hostel is good.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research:

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research is up to 60. Good thing to know is that KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like PCI.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research for all courses combined?

reviews_list.review_title: The college has great faculty and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement cell in the college but the teachers help to get a job according to their knowledge. I do think that it is a great decision to get admission to this college but if you want a placement cell in your college check other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is great. There are Wi-Fi-enabled labs in the college but I think they could be better but it is great compared to other colleges.
review_content.Faculty: All the teachers in our college are good and knowledgeable. They are very helpful. The semesters are quite hard but it is average. The curriculum is super relevant and I think that its a great thing to have so much qualified teachers.

reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty, nice infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The highest placement last year was 2.4 LPA. Around 50% of students are placed. Wipro, TCS, NSEIT, Data Matics, WNS, Infosys, and Dixon are the recruiting companies. The top recruiters are L&T, Lodha Group, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: I don't live in a hostel, so I'm not sure about this, but my friends living there don't have much to complain about. But most of the students prefer living in the PG or flats near the college. (but the maximum number of students is from the same city, so the no. Living in a hostel is really less) (at least in our batch).
review_content.Faculty: All faculty members are really supportive. They help with the exam preparation too. Teachers are really knowledgeable. They help in clearing all the doubts. The course curriculum is relevant and helps to gain knowledge. They teach students properly and try to clear every doubt of their students.
