individual_reviews.title: College provides a wealth of academic and extracurricular opportunities.

content.Placements: In this year, Medplus Company gives placements to students of 10+2, a B.Pharma, and a D.Pharma graduate student. The Institute of Pharmacy College will place 86 percent of its students in the Medplus company in 2023. Medplus is a healthcare company. B. pharmacy graduate students can also be placed in this company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not bad; all facilities are provided by the college (access to the library, gym, computer lab, etc.).  Students in grades 10+2 are eligible for Medplus internships. There are a total of eighty-six placements at the college of pharmacy this year.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Naik college of pharmacy.

content.Placements: There are many possibilities for campus placements. KVN Naik college of pharmacy institute has a separate training and placement cell ahe help him in placement. The college also provides free coaching for SSB and other exams. The college has dedicated faculty and strict course.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are very good with 100% accommodation and single seater rooms. The infrastructure of the KVN Naik college of pharmacy hostel is very developed. The best part of the college is its auditorium which is graded as the best auditorium in North. Best faculty, best friends, best management.

individual_reviews.title: The college has great faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: There is no placement cell in the college but the teachers help to get a job according to their knowledge. I do think that it is a great decision to get admission to this college but if you want a placement cell in your college check other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is great. There are Wi-Fi-enabled labs in the college but I think they could be better but it is great compared to other colleges.
content.Faculty: All the teachers in our college are good and knowledgeable. They are very helpful. The semesters are quite hard but it is average. The curriculum is super relevant and I think that its a great thing to have so much qualified teachers.

individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, nice infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The highest placement last year was 2.4 LPA. Around 50% of students are placed. Wipro, TCS, NSEIT, Data Matics, WNS, Infosys, and Dixon are the recruiting companies. The top recruiters are L&T, Lodha Group, etc.
content.Infrastructure: I don't live in a hostel, so I'm not sure about this, but my friends living there don't have much to complain about. But most of the students prefer living in the PG or flats near the college. (but the maximum number of students is from the same city, so the no. Living in a hostel is really less) (at least in our batch).
content.Faculty: All faculty members are really supportive. They help with the exam preparation too. Teachers are really knowledgeable. They help in clearing all the doubts. The course curriculum is relevant and helps to gain knowledge. They teach students properly and try to clear every doubt of their students.

individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges in Nashik.

content.Placements: In my college, lots of students passed out from this course. INR 14 lacs, INR 4.5 lacs, and INR 30+ lacs are the average, lowest, and highest packages for college, respectively. Many big companies came for placements. Above 8.14 CGPA, or 70% above, is required for internships and the best job.
content.Infrastructure: There are medical facilities as well as 24-hour wifi on my college campus. Classrooms are so large. The canteen, mess, and sports, or games like cricket, football, and Kabbadi, are also there in my college. Hostel quality is the best.

admission_process.title: KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theKVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Researchapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG programmes in fields of Medicine and Health Sciences, and more. To know about the eligibility of KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research courses, students can visit the website.

KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research fees is online. faqs.question: How many seats are available at KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research is up to 60. Good thing to know is that KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like PCI.

faqs.question: How can I get into KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
KVN Naik SP Santha's Institute Of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council.
The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State.
Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible.
Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.D.PharmaCandidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any reco
